top_tweets.text: As AI agents accelerate coding, what is the future of software engineering? Some trends are clear, such as the Product Management Bottleneck, referring to the idea that we are more constrained by deciding what to build rather than the actual building. But many implications, like
top_tweets.author: AndrewYNg
top_tweets.name: Andrew Ng
top_tweets.summary_zh: 隨著 AI 加速編碼能力，軟體工程的未來面臨「產品管理瓶頸」——決定要做什麼比實際構建變成更大的限制因素。

top_tweets.text:

This is not a "quality" issue. It is a
top_tweets.author: longstoryfarms

top_tweets.text:
